page: Microsoft Azure M176s_3_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MSMediumMemoryv3 server family. It is powered by dedicated Intel processors utilizing the x86_64 architecture, delivering 176 vCPUs. The system is provisioned with 2794.0 GB of system memory, which translates to a high memory density of 15.88 GB per vCPU. This instance operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server configuration does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options, though the instance is premium storage capable. There are no integrated GPUs, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or parallel computing workloads. Additionally, the instance does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the M176s_3_v3 offers high memory density per dedicated vCPU, making it suitable for large-scale enterprise workloads that require massive RAM allocations without the overhead of physical hardware management. Appropriate workloads include large in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data analytics pipelines that fit entirely within system memory.
description: Microsoft Azure M176s_3_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 176 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel x86_64 processor architecture and is equipped with 2794.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 15.88 GB per core. The instance lacks local storage, requiring external premium storage volumes, and does not include integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The high memory density makes it suitable for hosting large in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and complex data analytics pipelines that require substantial memory capacity.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M176s_3_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 176 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 2794.0 GB of RAM, designed for large in-memory databases and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated processors and substantial RAM capacity for enterprise-scale in-memory workloads.

2794.0 GB of system memory providing 15.88 GB per vCPU
